'''Avke Saz'ula''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Gunnery officer/Legends|gunnery officer]] onboard the ''[[Avengeance]]''. He served in [[MaxSec Eight]] along with the rest of the crew attempting to find [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]] in order to finish the [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[ar'krai]]. He was a cousin to [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Nek Bwua'tu]]'s third wife.
